summary: T4-R2-01 is correctly resolved. The ReentrancyGuard slot comment is now in the constructor NatSpec where it belongs, constants are accurate (NOT_ENTERED = 1, ENTERED = 2), and the 0 -> ENTERED (2) -> NOT_ENTERED (1) transition is correctly documented. No remaining issues. Task 4 implementation is approved.

T4-R2-01.description: Comment relocated from initialize() to constructor NatSpec. Constants corrected: NOT_ENTERED = 1, ENTERED = 2. Transition documented as 0 -> ENTERED (2) -> NOT_ENTERED (1). Factually accurate and correctly placed.
